title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero (VP of Engineering, Cursor) discusses how companies plateau at 40% productivity gains with AI coding assistants and proposes that expanding agentic workflows beyond code writing to encompass bug triage, security review, and growth experiments is the path forward. He outlines the architectural and organizational shifts required to build agent teams across the full software development lifecycle.
